text:
The CMMI Model Data Sharing (CMDS) Provider file is one of a set of three file types (entity, provider, beneficiary) included for each model. A Provider is a Medicare provider/supplier who has an arrangement with an Entity to participate as a member of their entity group in a model.
What does this file include? (variable highlights)
- Model ID (in which the Provider participates)
- Entity ID (with which the Provider is associated)
- National Provider Identifier (NPI)
- Tax Identification Number
